events.raw_text:
Thu, Dec 4, 2025 · 6:45 PM to 9:30 PM CET

Talk 1 - How to enable self-service analytics through the (dbt) semantic layer (Astrafy)
Talk 2 - Avoiding dbt mess. From 1000+ model dbt mono-repository to multi-project (Mercadona Tech)

talks.description: How semantic layers (dbt/Lightdash) empower all kinds of users to navigate their data without technical knowledge.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: In this session, you'll discover how semantic layers (dbt/Lightdashs) empowers all kind of users to navigate their data without technical knowledge.
talks.title: How to enable self-service analytics through the (dbt) semantic layer

talks.description: Breaking down a huge dbt mono-repository into smaller multi-project setups using cookiecutter templates, enforcing software engineering best practices like TDD and data contracts.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: In this session, we'll take you behind the scenes of our journey to redefine data workflows and elevate data quality by breaking down a huge dbt repository into smaller dbt projects leveraging cookiecutter templates.
talks.title: Avoiding dbt mess: From 1000+ model dbt mono-repository to multi-project

Thu, Nov 21, 2024 · 6:45 PM to 10:00 PM CET

19:00 Data validation with dbt: Going beyond testing (Alejandro de la Cruz Lopez - Astrafy)
19:25 How Airflow + dbt Work Together at Okta (Miquel Angel Andreu Febrer - Okta)
19:50 Leveraging column-level lineage to scale your dbt projects (Benoit Perigaud - dbt)

talks.description: Advanced data validation techniques beyond conventional dbt testing, using Recce for validation checks and improved approval requests.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: dbt can be leveraged for more than just basic testing. We will dive into advanced data validation techniques that ensure data quality beyond conventional testing in dbt. We will use Recce as a new emerging tool that allows validation checks and improved approval requests.
talks.title: Data validation with dbt: Going beyond testing

talks.description: How Airflow and dbt work together at Okta.

events.raw_text:
Thu, Jun 27, 2024 · 6:45 PM to 8:45 PM CEST

19h05: dbt semantic layer (Charles Verleyen & Alejandro de la Cruz Lopez - Astrafy)
19h45: Standardizing pipelines with DBT without dying trying (Ruben Ibañez Pinillo & Miguel Martin Tapia - Mercadona Tech)

talks.description: The concepts of a semantic layer, why it's a foundational pillar for LLMs, with a hands-on demo.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: We will explore the concepts of a semantic layer and why it has been gaining traction recently. We will talk about why it is a foundation pillar for LLM and finish with a hands-on demo.
talks.speaker_name: Charles Verleyen, Alejandro de la Cruz Lopez
talks.title: dbt semantic layer

talks.description: Best practices for using dbt to standardize pipelines without sacrificing sanity, improving data quality and consistency across an organization.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: The talk explores the benefits and challenges of using DBT, a powerful tool for building and managing data transformations, to achieve standardization without sacrificing sanity.
talks.speaker_name: Ruben Ibañez Pinillo, Miguel Martin Tapia
talks.title: Standardizing pipelines with DBT without dying trying

additional_metadata.organizer: Astrafy, enabled by the community team at dbt Labs

events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: Utopicus Habana, P.º de La Habana 9-11, Madrid
events.raw_text:
Thu, Jan 25, 2024 · 6:45 PM to 8:45 PM CET

19h00: Multi-projects collaboration with dbt Cloud (Charles Verleyen & Alejandro de la Cruz Lopez - Astrafy)
19h40: Behold the "plugin" - Reusing dbt pipelines and standardising data access across multiple clients (Javier Asensio & Juan Alonso - Octopus Energy)

talks.description: The basics of dbt Cloud and its multi-projects collaboration features (dependencies.yml, model versioning, data contracts), demoed with the jaffle shop repositories.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: dbt cloud is gaining a lot of traction due to its accessibility and important new data mesh features that facilitate multi projects collaboration.
talks.speaker_name: Charles Verleyen, Alejandro de la Cruz Lopez
talks.title: Multi-projects collaboration with dbt Cloud

talks.description: Reusing dbt pipelines and standardizing data access across multiple clients at Octopus Energy, which operates in 8 different countries.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Octopus energy provides energy in 8 different countries. Every single provider is a wee bit the sam[e]
talks.title: Behold the "plugin": Reusing dbt pipelines and standardising data access across multiple clients

additional_metadata.organizer: Astrafy, enabled by the community team at dbt Labs

events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.
events.location: Utopicus Principe de Vergara, C. del Príncipe de Vergara 112, Madrid
events.raw_text:
Thu, Oct 5, 2023 · 6:45 PM to 9:45 PM CEST

19h00: dbt history and its potential for data quality (Charles Verleyen & Alejandro de la Cruz Lopez - Astrafy)
19h40: Managing alerting workflow with dbt (Mikkel Dengsoe - Synq)

talks.description: dbt's history from its genesis in 2016 to its massive fundraising, the key factors that made it so popular, and how it helps with data quality.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: from its genesis in 2016 until its massive fundraising in recent years, dbt has revolutionized the data world in just a few years. In this talk we will look back at the key factors that made dbt so popular and we will then talk about how dbt can help with data quality.
talks.speaker_name: Charles Verleyen, Alejandro de la Cruz Lopez
talks.title: dbt history and its potential for data quality

talks.description: Managing alerting workflows with dbt as teams scale.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: Managing the alerting workflow is no easy task as you scale.
talks.title: Managing alerting workflow with dbt

additional_metadata.venue_host: Utopicus Paseo de la Habana, Madrid

events.agenda: 18:30 Welcome with food & drinks; 19:00 Data Mesh with dbt talk; 19:45 Break; 20:00 Real-time analytics talk; 20:30 Networking & drinks & pizzas.

events.raw_text:
Thu, Jun 29, 2023 · 6:30 PM to 8:30 PM CEST

19h00: Data Mesh with dbt (Charles Verleyen & Alejandro de la Cruz Lopez - Astrafy)
20h00: Real-time analytics with Google Cloud Asset inventory data and dbt (Alejandro Martín Valledor - Tinybird)

talks.description: Demystifying the main concepts of data mesh, brought to life with dbt and concrete data products from Astrafy's real data, including activation of data via the dbt semantic layer.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: In this session I will demystify the main concepts of data mesh and bring those to life with dbt with concrete data products from Astrafy real data.
talks.speaker_name: Charles Verleyen, Alejandro de la Cruz Lopez
talks.title: Data Mesh with dbt

talks.description: Real-time analytics with Google Cloud Asset inventory data and dbt.

talks.title: Real-time analytics with Google Cloud Asset inventory data and dbt
